# UC-17.5.9 · Forcepoint Bandwidth Consumption by Application Category (`forcepoint:one`)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Capacity, Performance &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.*

---

## Description

Understanding heavy categories guides QoS, caching, and SD-WAN policies.

## Value

Finance and infrastructure plan capacity with shared data.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" earliest=-24h
| stats sum(bytes_in) as in_b sum(bytes_out) as out_b by category
| eval total_mb=round((in_b+out_b)/1048576,2)
| sort -total_mb
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Treemap (category bytes), table.

## Known False Positives

Spikes from new SaaS rollouts, automated workflows, sanctioned bulk uploads, or M&A integration.

- [Splunkbase — Forcepoint Insights SIEM App](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/8053)
